title: Tenant Profile v1
description: Governance and blast-radius profile for a single tenant, including blast tiers, default corridors, and probabilistic reachability settings.

id.description: Stable identifier for this tenant profile document, e.g. a UUID or Dead-Ledger-attested ID.

tenantId.description: Tenant identifier used across constellation systems.

updatedAt.description: Last update timestamp in RFC 3339 format.

status.description: Lifecycle status of this tenant profile.

description.description: Optional descriptive text about this tenant's purpose and constraints.

deadLedgerRef.description: Optional Dead-Ledger attestation reference for this tenant profile.

blastTierTaxonomy.description: Blast-tier taxonomy for this tenant, mapping tiers (T0–T3) to allowed egress zones and radius constraints.

tiers.description: Ordered list of tiers, from least to most permissive.

description.description: Optional description of this tier's intent and constraints.

maxDepth.description: Optional maximum blast BFS depth for this tier.

allowedEgressZones.description: List of logical zone identifiers where egress is allowed for this tier.

maxEBR.description: Optional maximum effective blast radius score for this tier.

notes.description: Optional free-form notes for this tier.

defaultCorridors.description: Default governance corridors for this tenant, including RoH, Veco, and NEF thresholds.

corridors.description: List of corridor definitions keyed by name and optionally by tier.

tierId.description: Optional tier this corridor is primarily intended for, e.g. 'T1' or 'T2'.

rohMax.description: Maximum allowed Radius of Harm (delta in number of HS nodes or blast radius).

vecoMax.description: Maximum allowed magnitude of the Vector of Exposure change.

nefMax.description: Maximum allowed Network Exposure Factor change.

maxNewHsNodes.description: Optional hard cap on newly reachable high-sensitivity nodes.

notes.description: Optional notes on how this corridor was derived (e.g., from tuning experiments).

probReachability.description: Tenant-level defaults for probabilistic reachability calculations.

maxPaths.description: Maximum number of highest-probability paths to consider when approximating reachability.

maxDepth.description: Maximum path length for probabilistic reachability queries.

defaultSuccessProb.description: Fallback success probability for edges without explicit measurements.

independenceAssumption.description: How to treat edge failures when combining path probabilities.

scenarioWeights.description: Optional per-scenario weights for correlated failure analysis when independenceAssumption is 'scenario-bucketed'.

truncationPolicy.description: Policy for truncating fan-out in large graphs to respect time budgets.

maxFanoutPerNode.description: Maximum number of outgoing edges per node considered in probabilistic traversal.

probCutoff.description: Minimum path success probability for a path to be included in aggregation.

uidTierBindings.description: Optional mapping from UID or UID ranges to blast tiers for this tenant.

kind.description: Binding kind: single UID, UID range, or role.

tierId.description: Tier identifier this binding maps to.

meta.description: Open-ended metadata for tooling, experiments, and annotations.
